---
title: "Hire Me"
description: "Production AI audits, custom MCP server builds, and ongoing operational retainer. Productized pricing for the LLM-leveraged era."
pagetitle: "Hire Temur Khan — production AI audits, custom MCP builds, ongoing retainer"
toc: false
---

If you're running production AI and something's quietly broken, I can help. Three engagement shapes — pick the right surface for your situation.

## Free triage call (start here if unsure)

A 30-minute conversation to walk through your stack and identify which tier makes sense — or whether none of them do. No commitment. No deck. Just a real diagnostic chat.

Use this if:
- You suspect something's off but can't pin it
- You're shopping around between tiers
- You want to ask "would this even help me?"

**Email:** [hello@temhan.dev](mailto:hello@temhan.dev?subject=Triage%20call) with subject `Triage call` + 1-2 lines on what's prompting the question. I reply within 2 business days.

---

## Production AI Audit

A focused review of your production AI deployment against the 35-pattern failure catalog ([Field Reference](https://temurah.gumroad.com/l/production-ai-mcp-suite) — bundled with the suite). Findings + corrective-action plan delivered within the engagement window.

| Tier | Scope | Investment | Timeline |
|------|-------|-----------:|----------|
| **Audit Lite** | One system, top-5 findings, written report | **$2,500** | 1 week |
| **Audit Standard** | Full 35-pattern review, 5 Cs findings, 90-day follow-up | **$4,500** | 2-3 weeks |
| **Audit + Workshop** | Standard + 2-day team workshop + first monthly check-in included | **$7,500** | 3-4 weeks |

**What you get:**

- Written report against the 35-pattern catalog (which patterns are present, which aren't, severity)
- Specific corrective actions (not "implement monitoring" — *exact* code changes, hooks, checks)
- 90-day follow-up call (Standard + Workshop tiers)

**Email:** [hello@temhan.dev](mailto:hello@temhan.dev?subject=AI%20audit%20inquiry) with subject `AI audit inquiry`. Include 1 paragraph on your stack + which tier you want.

---

## Custom MCP Build

Adapt the 7 MCP servers I've shipped — or build a new server entirely — for your specific stack. Three productized tiers calibrated to honest 2026 LLM-leveraged labor cost.

| Tier | Scope | Investment | Timeline |
|------|-------|-----------:|----------|
| **MCP-Pack Adapter** | Fork + tune one of the 7 existing MCPs for your domain (custom prompts, severity rules, log-format adapter) | **$2,000** | 3-5 days |
| **Custom MCP Server** | Purpose-built single-tool MCP for a specific failure-mode in your stack | **$10,000–15,000** | 1-2 weeks |
| **Production AI Platform** | Multi-MCP build, LLM-as-judge backends, persistence, full CI integration, audit-trail | **$30,000–45,000** | 4-8 weeks |

**What you get:**

- Working MCP tested against your real production data (not synthetic fixtures)
- Source code transferred to your repo (not hosted on my infra)
- Documentation + setup walkthrough + 30-day post-ship support
- Optional: open-source the generic version, keep the domain-specific layer private

**Email:** [hello@temhan.dev](mailto:hello@temhan.dev?subject=Custom%20MCP%20Build%20inquiry) with subject `Custom MCP Build inquiry`. Include 1 paragraph on your stack + which tier.

---

## Ops Monitor — ongoing retainer

The other engagement shape: a recurring relationship instead of a one-shot engagement. Best fit if you've got production AI and want a trusted-advisor on call without paying audit-tier prices every quarter.

| Tier | Investment | Includes |
|------|-----------:|---------|
| **Ops Monitor Lite** | **$500/mo** | Quarterly audit (lighter than Audit Lite) · monthly 30-min check-in · Slack channel for ad-hoc questions · priority on the 7-MCP roadmap (your stack's needs influence what ships) |
| **Ops Monitor Standard** | **$1,500/mo** | Everything in Lite + one custom adapter OR tier-prompt update per quarter (rolled into the retainer instead of one-off Adapter engagement) |

Cancel anytime. No annual commitment. Pause for 1-2 months if you're between projects.

**Email:** [hello@temhan.dev](mailto:hello@temhan.dev?subject=Ops%20Monitor%20inquiry) with subject `Ops Monitor inquiry`. Include 1 paragraph on what you're running + which tier you're considering.

---

## How engagements work

1. **You email** with a one-paragraph description of your stack + the tier you're considering
2. **I reply within 2 business days** with a 30-min discovery call slot (or skip directly to scoping if it's clear)
3. **Discovery call** confirms scope, timeline, and any red flags. Free.
4. **One-page SOW** sent within 24 hours of the call. You review, send back any redlines.
5. **Signed SOW + first payment** triggers start. I never start work pre-payment.
6. **Engagement runs** with weekly check-ins (or monthly for retainers).
7. **Deliverables hand-off** + 30-day or 90-day follow-up depending on tier.

Average from first email to signed SOW: ~5 business days.

---

## Why this pricing

LLMs collapsed the cost of writing code. They didn't collapse the cost of judgment, accountability, or relationship. Pricing reflects that:

- **Audits** stay in the $2.5-7.5k band because the value is pattern recognition + corrective plan, not labor hours
- **MCP-Pack Adapter is $2k flat** because the work is genuinely 8-hour LLM-assisted in 2026 — anchoring it to old hourly rates would be overcharging
- **Custom MCP Server compressed to $10-15k** for the same reason — honest about what's now scriptable vs what still needs human engineering
- **Production AI Platform stays at $30-45k** because that tier is genuine systems work — LLM-as-judge backends, persistence, audit-trail integration — where human architecture decisions are the actual deliverable
- **Retainer at $500-1,500/mo** is intentionally low-friction entry because ongoing trusted-advisor is the LLM-immune offer + recurring revenue compounds

You could prompt-engineer most of these yourself in a week with Claude Code. Or pay me a fixed price and have it Friday with my reputation behind it. The choice should be obvious for either path — depending on whether your time is worth more than my fee.

---

## What I don't do

To be honest about scope mismatch:

- **No fixed-price engagements over $45k.** Above that, hourly is safer for both of us.
- **No subscription / retainer engagements over $1,500/mo** until we've completed at least one fixed-scope engagement together — proves fit before scaling.
- **No "rescue" work without a paid audit first.** If you say *"we deployed AI, it failed, please fix it"* — the right first step is the audit, not skipping straight to fix-it.
- **No work without signed SOW + first payment.** Verbal "let's get going" = unpaid work guarantee. Even with good-faith clients.

---

## Common questions

**"What stacks have you worked with?"**

Production AI deployments across LangChain, LlamaIndex, vanilla SDK calls, custom agent harnesses, OpenClaw, Claude Code, Cursor, Anthropic API, OpenAI API, Gemini, AWS Bedrock. The patterns generalize across all of them — that's the point of the 35-pattern catalog.

**"Do you have references?"**

Engagement-specific. Mention in your inquiry email if references matter for your buying process; happy to share once we're past discovery.

**"What if my problem isn't on the catalog?"**

Then we add it. The catalog is a working artifact, not a fixed bible.

**"Can you do a free audit so I can decide?"**

The free version is the [AI Production Auditor Custom GPT](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-69f224f4c4c88191bb81e97051dab692-ai-production-auditor) — paste your config, get a 5 Cs report. Same methodology, no signup beyond ChatGPT. Useful as a self-serve first pass before commissioning paid work.

For something more tailored: book the **free triage call** above. It's 30 minutes; no commitment.

**"Why isn't there an hourly option?"**

LLM-leverage punishes hourly billing. It encourages scope creep, rewards slow work, and prices to cost-of-labor instead of value-delivered. Fixed-price + retainer protects both sides — buyer gets a predictable number; I get to use my LLM-leverage without it eating my margin.

**"What if my problem is bigger than $45k?"**

Then it's a multi-engagement relationship, not a fixed-price job. Start with an Audit Standard or Production AI Platform tier. Once we've worked together once, scaling up gets a lot easier.
